mcpServers._comment: MCP servers. (1) AI-Native methodology tools (drift / decision-table / formal-spec-link / schema / spectral / static) = SKILL Bash fallback (src/cli.js) until MCP wrappers written. (2) headroom = OPT-IN companion (LLM context compression / chopratejas/headroom) — ACTIVE only when CONTEXT_OPS_INSTALL_HEADROOM=1 AND headroom on PATH; launcher no-ops otherwise. (3) codegraph = OPT-IN structural-search companion (token-saving navigation / colbymchenry/codegraph) — ACTIVE only when CONTEXT_OPS_CODEGRAPH_MCP=1 AND codegraph on PATH AND project indexed; launcher no-ops otherwise. Both default OFF; SessionStart hook installs + bootstraps. codegraph = reference-lens/SEARCH only, NEVER gate-injected (DEC-2026-05-28 §4.2); grep stays authoritative valve. DEC-2026-06-15-headroom-companion + plan-codegraph-search-token-saving.
